# SYNTHETIC fixture (note the leading underscore: not part of the real labeled
# universe). CLIFFCO illustrates the Tier-1 BLIND SPOT: a company whose distress
# is qualitative/forward-looking -- a going-concern opinion and a large debt
# maturity due within 12 months -- but whose TRAILING numbers look clean. All
# five numeric Tier-1 rules pass; the distress lives in filing language and the
# debt-maturity schedule, which Tier 2 (event detection) and Tier 3 (language
# checks) cover. Kept out of config/labels.yaml so calibration stays honest.
